system.specialQuality: harms only those whose life is forfeit

selected: to consume the dying breaths of the condemned

system.moves:
- Track down one whose life is forfeit
- Wait until they are alone
- Shape a hulking form from peat, soil, and mud (takes half damage from stabbing, slashing, or fire)
- Whisper its victim’s crimes, freezing them with fear

In Ferrier’s Fen (page 116), not far from Marshedge (page 274), there lies a peat mound where the town buries criminals alive. Over the years, the place has given birth to a spirit of death and punishment. The spirit is young and eager, and can be set to work upon criminals; see the grim peat mound (page 511) minor arcanum for details.
